About 🐝 🕯

I'm an inspiring Software Developer working in Austin, TX. Raised in West Texas, I came to Austin for my undergraduate education. Completing degrees in Chemistry and Mathematics with a certificate in Computer Science from UT Austin.

Currently I work at Apple as Data Analyst in AI/ML but I'm actively working for whats next. I've also enrolled back at UT Austin to explore my interest in Algebra, Number Theory, and Compilers.

You can find some projects I've worked on in my spare time on my github account, and my resume is also available.
